summary: Support the RBA Directorate Front Office in strengthening coordination, documentation, and task management systems. Assist in organizing and servicing meetings (including preparing agendas and drafting minutes), maintaining calendars and Directorate tasking logs, and ensuring timely follow-up with country offices and HQ units. Contribute to the development and maintenance of a structured documentation system (SharePoint and shared drives) to ensure accessibility and accuracy of records. Support

Under the overall supervision and guidance of the Partnerships and Advocacy Specialist and working day-to-day reporting to various team members leading on different substantive issues, the interns will focus on the following: Policy Analysis and secretariat support (20%); Communication and Advocacy (40%); Events Liaison (40%).
